title: felicia tenella subsp. cotuloides
intro: Felicia tenella subsp. cotuloides, also known as blue felicia or blue bush daisy, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities, derived from its essential oils and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Felicia tenella subsp. cotuloides include reducing inflammation, treating wounds and skin irritations, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as tea infusions and topical creams, are used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
